name: Raisin Granola Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except raisins and peanuts. With mixer on low speed, beat ingredients until just mixed. Increase speed to medium and beat for two minutes, occasionally scraping the bowl with a rubber spatula. Stir in raisins and peanuts until mixture is well blended. Drop dough by heaping tablespoonfuls, about 2 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet. Bake cookies for 10 to 14 minutes, or until lightly browned around the edges. Remove cookies to wire racks and allow to cool completely.
Store cookies in a tightly covered container up to 1 week.
